description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, rectangular structure with a prominent vertical display screen set into a black frame. The control panel is angled and equipped with two joysticks and multiple blue buttons, suggesting support for two players. The cabinet is constructed primarily from black materials, giving it a sleek and modern appearance, with the control panel's blue accents providing a striking contrast. The screen displays vibrant, colorful graphics, likely from a video game, and is bordered by a thick bezel. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain, with no visible artwork or decals. There is no visible coin slot or marquee artwork at the top, emphasizing a minimalist design.
description: A tall, black arcade game cabinet with a vertical screen, blue-accented dual-player controls, and a minimalist, unadorned exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical display screen with colorful graphics, dual joysticks, and blue buttons on the control panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cabinet's angular profile and the protruding control panel, with one joystick visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, featureless black back panel with no visible openings or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the cabinet's sloped design and the control panel's button layout.
attribute_screen_type: LCD, flat, large vertical orientation with a thick black bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple blue buttons arranged in a two-player side-by-side layout, with a black panel and blue color scheme
